positive: A hyper-detailed, minimalist illustration featuring a majestic, stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The sky is rendered in deep gradient tones of sapphire blue, violet, and fiery orange, transitioning smoothly. The mountains are sharp, clean geometric shapes with peaks breaking into clean, negative space. Foreground elements include a simplified, winding path and a cluster of abstracted, stylized pine trees. The overall style is modern vector illustration meets fine art linework, suitable for high-contrast screen printing on apparel. Composition is symmetrical and centered, maximizing visual impact. Lighting is dramatic backlighting from the setting sun, casting long, clean shadows. Color palette emphasizes deep jewel tones contrasted with crisp white highlights.
negative: blur, noisy, grain, low quality, artifact, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, abstract, photorealistic, complex background, dirty, muted colors
